mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (anonymous_id, content_id, behavior_type, behavior_weight, create_time) VALUES (#{anonymousId}, #{contentId}, #{behaviorType}, #{behaviorWeight}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT content_id FROM ( SELECT content_id, create_time FROM user_behavior WHERE anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} AND behavior_type = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC ) AS temp GROUP BY content_id ORDER BY MAX(create_time) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
